interactions.summary: Jiang agrees with Dave's Democrat-warning frame and predicts liberal boomers will treat conservative white men as the plague to be destroyed through digital currency, carbon tax, cancel culture, DEI, and immigration.
Sneako asks what Gen Z and Gen Alpha should do if the boomer voting class keeps voting for its own interests, including whether young people should vote left in the midterms.
Dave says voting is strategic, argues Democrats may win the midterms and Republicans deserve punishment for the war, but rejects supporting major-party insiders tied to the administration.

claims.claim: Jiang predicts Democrats will target conservative white men as the primary threat to their worldview if they return to power.
Jiang names digital currency, carbon tax, cancel culture, DEI, and illegal immigration as tools Democrats would use against that target group.
Dave says Republicans should be punished for the Iran war and that no major Trump-administration figure should receive future support unless they break from it.

signature_moments.moment: Jiang casts liberal-boomer politics as a plague hunt against conservative white men.
signature_moments.source_phrase: the disease, the plague in America are conservative white men
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It is Jiang's starkest formulation of the domestic enemy-image he expects Democrats to mobilize.

signature_moments.moment: Dave says he does not want the smell of supporting Trump on him again.
signature_moments.source_phrase: I just don't want that filthy smell on me again
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It marks the emotional break between anti-war dissidents and the Trump coalition.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Sneako's term for older voters who still dominate elections and vote their generational interests.

chronology_notes.note: Dave expects Democrats to win the 2026 midterms but distinguishes that from giving Democrats the White House and both chambers.
